name_en: Kakko Drum Dance of Tsuruoka and Its Implements
description_en: A folk cultural property comprising the kakko drum dance of Tsuruoka and its associated implements. It is municipally designated by Futtsu City, with designation dating to 1978. Located in Tsuruoka.

name_romaji: Takeoka Mihashira Jinja no Kiyari Shishimai
name_en: Kiyari Lion Dance of Takeoka Mihashira Shrine
description_en: A folk cultural property, the kiyari lion dance of Takeoka Mihashira Shrine. It is municipally designated by Futtsu City, with designation dating to 2013. Located in Takeoka.

name_en: Earthenware Excavated from the Mimomi 3-chōme Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of earthenware excavated from the Mimomi 3-chōme site. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 2014-04-02. Kept within Narashino City Hall, Saginuma 2-chōme 1-1.

name_en: Ink-Inscribed Pottery Excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of ink-inscribed pottery excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 2015-11-09. Kept within Narashino City Hall, Saginuma 2-chōme 1-1.

name_en: Ceramic Pagoda Excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a ceramic pagoda (gatō) excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 2015-11-09. Kept within Narashino City Hall, Saginuma 2-chōme 1-1.

name_en: Coins Excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of coins excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 2015-11-09. Kept within Narashino City Hall, Saginuma 2-chōme 1-1.

name_en: Metal Objects Excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of metal objects excavated from the Yatsu Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 2015-11-09. Kept within Narashino City Hall, Saginuma 2-chōme 1-1.

name_en: Materials Related to German Prisoners of War
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of materials related to German prisoners of war. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 2019-09-03. Kept within Narashino City Hall, Saginuma 2-chōme 1-1.

name_en: Nori Seaweed Cultivation Implements and Related Items
description_en: A folk cultural property comprising nori seaweed cultivation implements and related items. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 1976-07-16. Kept within Narashino City Hall, Saginuma 2-chōme 1-1.

name_en: Fujizuka Mound of the Fujisaki Fuji Confraternity
description_en: A folk cultural property, the fujizuka (miniature Mount Fuji mound) of the Fujisaki Fuji confraternity. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 2023-03-01. Located at Fujisaki 1-chōme 176, within the Fujisaki Horikome Shell Mound.

name_en: Cist Stone Coffin of Saginuma Tumulus B
description_en: A monument designated as a historic site, the cist stone coffin of Saginuma Tumulus B. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 1976-07-16. Located at Saginuma 1-chōme 9, within Saginuma Castle Site Park.

name_en: Great Ginkgo Tree of Shōfukuji Temple, Fujisaki
description_en: A monument designated as a natural monument, the great ginkgo tree of Shōfukuji Temple in Fujisaki. It was municipally designated by Narashino City on 1976-07-16. Located at Fujisaki 1-chōme 8, beside the Koyasu Kannon Hall.
A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a shaku clock. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1962-01-05. Kept at the Inō Tadataka Memorial Museum (Sawara-i).

name_en: Former Portable Shrine (Mikoshi) of Yasaka Shrine
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, the former portable shrine (mikoshi) of Yasaka Shrine. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1965-02-18. Kept at the Suigō Sawara Dashi Kaikan (Sawara-i).
A tangible cultural property in the paintings category depicting the Sixteen Arhats. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1967-12-22. Held by Tokushōji Temple (Omi).
A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, an image of Yakushi Nyorai. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1967-12-22. Privately held (Tabe).

name_en: Text of the Great Prajñā-pāramitā Sutra
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the classical texts category, a text of the Daihannya (Great Prajñā-pāramitā) Sutra. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1967-12-22. Held by Shinpukuji Temple (Kanō).

name_en: Site of Tree Planting Guided by Doi Toshikatsu
description_en: A monument designated as a historic site, the site of tree planting guided by Doi Toshikatsu. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1967-12-22. Privately held (Nira).
A monument designated as a historic site, the Sukizaki Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Privately held (Sukizaki).
A monument designated as a historic site, the Saburōsaku Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Privately held (Shin'ichiba).
A monument designated as a historic site, the Ōkura Minami Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Privately held (Ōkura).
A monument designated as a historic site, the Daihata Shell Mound. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Privately held (Tada).
A monument designated as a historic site, the Katano Shinbayashi burial mound. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Privately held (Katano).
A monument designated as a historic site, the Matami burial mound. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Located at Matami Shrine (Katori).
A monument designated as a historic site, the site of Motoyahagi Castle. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Held by the Motoyahagi district (Motoyahagi).
A monument designated as a historic site, the site of Ōsaki Castle. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Privately held (Ōsaki).
A monument designated as a historic site, the grave of Inō Tadataka. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Located at Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).
A monument designated as a historic site, the grave of Imaizumi Tsunemaru. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Located at the Maebara communal cemetery (Sawara-i).
A monument designated as a historic site, the grave of Katori Nahiko. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Located at Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).
A monument designated as a historic site, the grave of Matsunaga Donshū. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Located at Senbutsuji Temple (Tsunomiya).
A monument designated as a historic site, the grave of Seimiya Hidekata. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Located at Jōkokuji Temple (Sawara-i).

name_romaji: Mokuzō Mika Nyorai dō Wakiji Zō
name_en: Wooden Statue of Mika Nyorai with Attendant Figures
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden statue of Mika Nyorai with attendant figures. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Held by Kōfukuji Temple (Terauchi).

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Held by Saifukuji Temple (Yamanobe).

name_en: Great Holly Olive Tree of Dōnoshita
description_en: A monument designated as a natural monument, the great hiiragi (holly olive) tree of Dōnoshita. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1970-05-27. Privately held (Nagayama).
An intangible folk cultural property, the lion dance of Tada. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1972-06-29. Maintained by the Tada district (Tada).
A monument designated as a historic site, Shiroyama Tumulus No. 4. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1973-04-23. Located in Omigawa Shiroyama Park (Omigawa).
A monument designated as a historic site, Tomita Tumulus No. 1. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1973-04-23. Privately held (Tomita).
A monument designated as a historic site, the nenbutsu mound of Yamakura. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1973-08-20. Privately held (Yamakura).

name_en: Anzan Ōkami (Deity of Safe Childbirth) Structure
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category, the Anzan Ōkami structure. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1973-08-20. Located at Atago Shrine (Fuma).
A monument designated as a natural monument, the great cedar of Ankōji Temple. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1975-11-12. Located at Ankōji Temple (Iwabe).
